attr.title: Otto's Tennis Game
attr.desc: One-button pong with gravity. You control your paddle by making your player jump by pressing the button. You can spam the button to fly.
attr.inst: Download the Windows game free from ottoojala.com (https://ottoojala.com), extract, and copy ottostennis.pck to the port's folder.
attr.inst_md: Download the **Windows** game free from [ottoojala.com](https://ottoojala.com), extract, and copy `ottostennis.pck` to the port's folder.
